name: Tour Studio Golf
address: 5005 McKinney Ranch Pkwy STE 250, McKinney, TX 75070
about: Tour Studio Golf is a high-performance indoor golf studio located in McKinney, TX. The facility features Trackman iO simulators paired with 4K laser projectors to provide a true-to-life playing experience, suitable for both casual rounds and serious game improvement. Membership options are available, with access ranging from 6 hours per month for the Basic tier to unlimited hours for the Elite and Tour Pro tiers, each offering varying levels of perks and booking privileges.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Trackman iO technology for precise shot data and analysis
24/7 access for members, allowing for flexible practice schedules
High-quality, immersive visuals with 4K laser projectors
Multiple membership tiers with options for various skill levels and usage needs
Availability for private events and corporate outings
